title: Syllogistic CSD Sampling: 3 Weak LLMs × d=2-30 × N=50 with Flickering Leading Indicator Test
summary: Demo notebook analyzing Critical Slowing Down (CSD) indicators from 3 weak LLMs (ministral-3b, llama-3.1-8b, gemini-2.0-flash-lite) across 22 difficulty levels (d=2-30) on syllogistic logic tasks. Loads 66 pre-computed CSD entries (model x difficulty), runs analysis functions (find critical difficulty d*, variance scaling, Kendall tau trend tests, mixture correlations), tests flickering as a leading indicator of reasoning collapse (SC1), and produces multi-panel visualizations of CSD indicators plus a flickering heatmap. Uses all original analysis thresholds. Data: 66 examples from the full experiment output covering all 3 models and 22 difficulty levels.
